name: type-to-phone
description: Electron control surface for the native Mac Input BLE HID service
author: Vic Zhang

scripts.build:native: xcodegen generate && xcodebuild -project MacInput.xcodeproj -scheme MacInput -configuration Debug -sdk macosx -derivedDataPath /tmp/MacInputDerived CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build
scripts.build:native:release: xcodegen generate && xcodebuild -project MacInput.xcodeproj -scheme MacInput -configuration Release -sdk macosx -derivedDataPath build/native CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build
scripts.test:native: xcodegen generate && xcodebuild -project MacInput.xcodeproj -scheme MacInputTests -configuration Debug -sdk macosx -derivedDataPath /tmp/MacInputDerived CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO test
scripts.check:js: node --check electron/main.js && node --check electron/preload.js && node --check electron/renderer/app.js
scripts.dist:dir: npm run build:native:release && CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --mac dir
